paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 208 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 108 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 39 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 13 days past due with 39 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **32 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,114 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 45 days past due with 38 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $29,627 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 37 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **54 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 33 days past due with 27 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,250 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 18 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **76 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 17 days past due with 11 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $14,079 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $47,002 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

312 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **274 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 22 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$85,321 in payments going out this week** across 46 tasks — make sure funds are available. $64,764 expected in from 10 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 6. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 18 overdue (oldest: 16d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **76 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 82 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 12 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 2. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 39 overdue (oldest: 13d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **32 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 38 overdue (oldest: 45d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 2 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 15. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 37 overdue (oldest: 16d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **54 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 54 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 27 overdue (oldest: 33d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 15 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 11 overdue (oldest: 17d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 30 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
